div.p: SFENCE is non-negotiable. NT stores use weakly-ordered memory semantics. Without _mm_sfence(), other threads or DMA devices may read inconsistent state from memory before the NT stores are actually globally visible.
Guideline: Non-temporal stores (_mm_stream_*) prevent heavy write workloads from evicting the active instruction/data set from L1/L2 caches.
BW | _______ NT (Streaming) | / | / GB/s| / ____ Normal (Cached) | / / | / / |//_______________ 0 L2sz L3sz RAM
Key Insight: NT stores provide stable throughput once buffer exceeds private cache capacity.
